productDisplayName: Hush Puppies Men Walsh Black Sandals
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these sandals from hush puppies are made for you. These fisherman style sandals are a great mix of classic styling and comfortable materials.Team these with jeans or chinos and tees for a cool look. Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Stitch detailing for added style Buckle closure near the ankle for a snug Fit Textile lining for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all day comfort EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole TPR outsole with deep squared out grooves with multi-directional grooves for better grip Heel for ergonomic comfort Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
